reviews.author: Stephany Esquivel
reviews.text: We come here regularly for all our dry cleaning needs! Most recently, we entrusted the team with my wedding dress and grooms suit. The team worked so quickly and ensured me our items were in the best hands. The garments look prestine. Shout out to Anna Jara lupita and Ellie for the best customer service! Highly recommend for all dry cleaning needs!

reviews.author: Joshua Vaillancourt
reviews.text: this place is amazing. I come here all the time for dry cleaning but also used their service recently for a one off situation. I had this old shirt I love but it always smells like it’s been in a closet or box for years lol. Not sure how else to explain it. I tried everything to get rid of the smell but nothing. I brought the shirt in here and it’s brand new now. thank you !

reviews.author: Alicia Waller
reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ 5 Stars!
I’ve been coming to ABC One Hour Cleaners for over six years now, and I can honestly say they are the best in town! They’re fast, affordable, and always do an amazing job. Even when I thought I lost a belt from one of my shirts, they had it waiting safely for me — talk about attention to detail!

Their alterations are top-notch too. Any fix or adjustment I’ve ever needed, they handled it perfectly. I will never take my clothes anywhere else — ABC One Hour Cleaners has earned a loyal customer for life!

reviews.author: Elijah Butler
reviews.text: Exceptional service ! Lupita,Yhara, Ana, and Elizabeth all took care of my last minute needs with great customer service and a smile on their faces! I recommend their services !

reviews.author: Mary Cibrian
reviews.text:
Was very hopeful about this place.
Dropped off 8 pieces for quick next day return, was then charged extra although it was not next day.
At pickup for these 8 pieces 1 top was missing and 1 piece was not mine.
(Take pictures of what you drop off)
Lesson learned.

reviews.author: Deepak Mohan
reviews.text: Norterra Cleaners are the best! I've been using their services for about three years now and they've never disappointed. Kim is great and very pleasing and friendly. She takes extra effort in ensuring that customer service is top notch and quick, even when it's busy. She is also very accommodating of special or expedited requests and is always willing to help. Keep up the great work!!

reviews.author: Molly Kellor
reviews.text: Good dependable service...I can't speak to how competitive prices are, since I don't often use a cleaner, but they have done a great job cleaning my queen size down comforters on several occasions with only a few day turn around, as promised.
